Your CompScience account manager · has prefilled this link for you.

First we need to know some of the key contacts...

Someone we can share device details with. They are responsible for receiving the shipment.

Prefilled from your CompScience deal · contact your account manager if this looks wrong.

One quick readiness check...

Before we proceed, please confirm the following about your facility.

I confirm that my facility has IP cameras focused on work areas with RTSP streaming capability, and that the camera network can be configured for the internet access required by the VMS — including any necessary firewall or network changes.

We're sorry...

There's a little more work to do before we can deliver the value you're expecting from the VMS. Your CompScience representative can help you plan camera coverage and network access so we can get you set up for success.

Please contact your CompScience representative to discuss next steps.
Not sure who to contact? Email cse@compscience.support and we'll connect you.

Where should we send your VMS Device?

Start with your country, then let us help you complete the address.

Request Submitted!

Your VMS device request has been received and is being processed.

Confirmation Number

What Happens Next?

1

Verify Your Email Address

Check for a verification link. You must verify your email before we can process your order.

2

Order Confirmation

After email verification, you'll receive a full order confirmation with device specifications and expected timeline.

3

Device Preparation

Our team will configure your VMS device for your specific site and camera setup. This typically takes 1-2 business days.

4

Shipping & Tracking

Your device will be shipped to . You'll receive tracking information via email. Estimated delivery: 3-5 business days.

5

Installation Support

Once you receive the device, our technical team will guide you through the installation and camera connection setup.
